TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Smith+Nephew hip materials describe flexible instrumentation for the R3 acetabular system and the POLARSTEM hip reconstruction system.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official product materials describe the POLARSTEM hip reconstruction system as the stem family within the solution.
Official product materials describe the R3 acetabular system as the cup platform within the solution.
Official product materials describe highly cross-linked polyethylene liner options for the R3 acetabular system.
Official product materials describe OXINIUM oxidized zirconium heads as part of the bearing construct.

row.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform built around the POLARSTEM femoral system and the R3 acetabular system.
